name: Abundance Revelation
description: Your first sustainable harvest sends a gentle pulse through the living web. Nearby beings feel a subtle bloom of resources. You sense that what you give returns multiplied, and what you hoard slowly withers.
educational_note: This is not instruction. This is direct experience: the web responds to sustainable giving. Hoarding creates scarcity. Mercy and sharing create more for all. The first true step into Resource-Based Economy is felt here.
